description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a release-image job in the deploy stage using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. The job should only run for tag pipelines. In the script, log in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then build the image with docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE ., tag it with the commit tag using docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG, and push it to the registry with docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE.
